# nomad_acl_role (Resource)

Manages an ACL Role in Nomad.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nomad_acl_policy" "my_nomad_acl_policy" {
  name        = "my-nomad-acl-policy"
  rules_hcl   = <<EOT
namespace "default" {
  policy       = "read"
  capabilities = ["submit-job"]
}
EOT
}

resource "nomad_acl_role" "my_nomad_acl_role" {
  name        = "my-nomad-acl-role"
  description = "An ACL Role for cluster developers"

  policy {
    name = nomad_acl_policy.my_nomad_acl_policy.name
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Unique name for this ACL role.
- `policy` (Block Set, Min: 1) The policies that should be applied to the role. It may be used multiple times. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--policy))

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description for this ACL role.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--policy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policy`

Required:

- `name` (String) The name of the ACL policy to link.
